metadata.title: Image Easy — Multi-model AI image generator with signup credits
metadata.description: Image Easy is a multi-model AI image generator with GPT Image 2, Seedream 4.5, Nano Banana Pro, monthly and annual plans, and limited-time signup credits.
metadata.ogDescription: Multi-model AI image generator with limited-time signup credits.

home.lead: Image Easy brings {models} into one focused interface. {noNoise} Sign up for free credits and start generating images.
home.leadNoNoise: No tab-hopping across model sites, no cluttered dashboards.
home.section1Body: Text-to-image, image editing, product visuals, and complex scenes — focused on what is actually {em}.
home.section2Body: Choose a model, write your prompt, click {em}. Results are saved automatically to your creations.
home.section3Body: Sign up to claim limited-time free credits. When you need more generation capacity, choose a monthly or annual subscription plan.
home.footerCopyright: Copyright © 2026 Image Easy Inc. All rights reserved.
home.limitedBody: New users can claim limited-time free credits. Different models and resolutions use different credits, failed generations are refunded automatically, and monthly or annual plans are available when you need more capacity.
home.modelCompareBody: GPT Image 2 is strong for realism and text rendering, Seedream 4.5 handles high-fidelity complex scenes, and Nano Banana Pro focuses on consistency and 4K output.
home.step1Text: Choose a text-to-image or image editing model, then adjust aspect ratio, resolution, and related settings.
home.step2Text: Write a natural-language prompt and see the estimated credit cost before generating.
home.step3Text: Results are saved to your creations for review, reuse, and download.
home.useCasesLead: Image Easy is built for creators and small teams that need to compare model output, keep generation history, and control costs.
home.useCase1Body: Generate product scenes, social creatives, and campaign images while comparing model styles.
home.useCase2Body: Explore people, styles, composition, and visual directions with prompts and reference images.
home.useCase3Body: Upload references for local redraws, restyling, scene changes, or more precise visual corrections.
home.faq1A: New users can claim limited-time free credits, and generation uses credits based on model and resolution. Choose a monthly or annual plan when you need more capacity.
home.faq2Q: What happens when free credits run out?
home.faq2A: You can continue with a monthly or annual subscription plan. Each plan grants credits monthly.
home.faq3Q: Which AI image models can I use?
home.faq3A: Image Easy currently supports GPT Image 2, Seedream 4.5, and Nano Banana Pro, with more models planned.
home.limitedTitle: Start with free credits. Upgrade when you need more.
home.title: Five AI image models in one workspace.
home.modelCompareTitle: Choose the model for the job.
home.examplesTitle: See what Image Easy can make.
home.examplesLead: A generated gallery that matches the product scenarios on this page: product visuals, ads, portraits, interiors, food, and concept art.

pricing.metaDescription: Sign up for limited-time free credits and see transparent credit usage by model and resolution. Monthly and annual plans are available.
pricing.title: Choose the plan for your creative work.
pricing.lead: New users can claim limited-time free credits; choose monthly or annual plans when you need more generation capacity.
pricing.planLine1: New users can claim free credits to try multi-model image generation.
pricing.planLine2: If paid plans are not configured yet, this page shows signup credits and credit usage rules.
pricing.detailsBody1: Subscription credits can be used across the current multi-model AI image generation workspace.
pricing.detailsBody2: Generation uses credits based on the selected model and resolution. Failed generations are refunded automatically.
pricing.checkoutSuccess: Payment received. Your credits will appear after Stripe confirms the checkout.
pricing.checkoutCancel: Checkout was canceled. No credits were added.
pricing.checkoutSignInRequired: Please sign in before buying credits.
pricing.costTableLead: These are the current credit costs for one generated image. Failed generations are refunded.

privacy.metaDescription: How Image Easy collects, uses, stores, and protects account, prompt, image, generation, payment, and service data.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.lead: This policy explains how Image Easy handles information when you create an account, upload images, write prompts, generate results, buy credits, or contact support.
privacy.notice: Effective date: June 28, 2026. This page is a practical business privacy notice and should be read together with the Terms of Use.
privacy.accountBody: We may collect your email address, authentication identifiers, profile details provided through sign-in providers, account status, credit balance, subscription status, support messages, and related records needed to operate your account.
privacy.contentBody: When you use Image Easy, we process prompts, uploaded reference images, selected model settings, generation requests, generated outputs, result URLs, and history records so the service can create, store, display, and help you reuse your images.
privacy.providersBody: Image Easy uses third-party providers for AI model access, hosting, storage, analytics, authentication, payment processing, and operational security. We share only the information reasonably needed for those vendors to provide their services, such as prompts, required image URLs, checkout metadata, or technical logs.
privacy.paymentsBody: Payments are processed by Stripe or another payment provider. Image Easy stores transaction records, subscription status, credit grants, invoices or payment identifiers, and fraud-prevention metadata, but we do not intentionally store full card numbers on our own servers.
privacy.securityBody: We use reasonable technical and organizational safeguards designed to protect account data, uploaded content, generated results, payment records, and service logs. No online service can guarantee absolute security, and you are responsible for protecting your login credentials.
privacy.retentionBody: We retain information for as long as needed to provide the service, maintain generation history, process payments, prevent abuse, resolve disputes, comply with legal obligations, and improve reliability. We may delete or anonymize older records when they are no longer needed.
privacy.rightsBody: You may contact us to request access, correction, export, or deletion of personal information associated with your account. Some records may be retained when required for billing, security, fraud prevention, legal compliance, or legitimate business recordkeeping.
privacy.childrenBody: Image Easy is not directed to children under 13, and we do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe a child has provided personal information, contact us so we can review and remove it where appropriate.
privacy.changesBody: We may update this Privacy Policy as Image Easy, our models, vendors, pricing, legal requirements, or business operations change. Material updates will be reflected on this page, and continued use of the service means the updated policy applies.
privacy.contactBody: For privacy questions or requests, email support@image-easy.com. Include the email address associated with your Image Easy account so we can locate the relevant records.

terms.metaDescription: Commercial terms for using Image Easy, including accounts, credits, subscriptions, content rights, prohibited use, AI output limitations, and price changes.
terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.lead: These terms govern your access to Image Easy, including image generation, uploaded content, generated outputs, credits, subscriptions, and related services.
terms.notice: Effective date: June 28, 2026. By using Image Easy, you agree to these terms. If you use the service for a company or client, you confirm you have authority to accept these terms for them.
terms.eligibilityBody: You must be able to form a binding agreement and comply with applicable law. You may not use Image Easy if you are barred from using similar services or if your use would violate sanctions, export controls, or local law.
terms.accountBody: You are responsible for your account, credentials, prompts, uploads, generated results, payment activity, and any use of Image Easy through your account. Notify us promptly if you believe your account has been compromised.
terms.creditsBody: Image generation uses credits based on the selected model, resolution, feature, and current usage rules. Free credits, promotional credits, subscription credits, and purchased credits may have different availability, expiration, refund, transfer, and abuse-prevention rules.
terms.priceChangesBody: Image Easy may change plan prices, credit packages, included credit amounts, model credit costs, free-credit promotions, taxes, fees, discounts, and subscription benefits in the future because AI model provider costs, infrastructure costs, exchange rates, taxes, product scope, and business conditions can change. Changes apply prospectively unless otherwise required by law or expressly stated at checkout.
terms.contentRightsBody: You are responsible for having the rights and permissions needed for prompts, uploaded images, reference materials, and how you use generated outputs. You grant Image Easy the rights needed to process, transmit, store, display, troubleshoot, secure, and improve the service.
terms.prohibitedBody: You may not use Image Easy to create or distribute illegal, abusive, deceptive, hateful, sexually exploitative, privacy-invasive, rights-infringing, malware-related, or otherwise harmful content, or to bypass safety, rate-limit, payment, or access controls.
terms.aiOutputsBody: AI-generated outputs may be inaccurate, unexpected, similar to outputs generated for others, or unsuitable for a particular commercial, legal, medical, financial, or professional use. You are responsible for reviewing outputs before using, publishing, or relying on them.
terms.subscriptionsBody: Paid plans renew according to the billing period shown at checkout unless canceled. Subscription credits and benefits are provided under the plan terms in effect for that billing period. Future renewal prices, credit amounts, and included benefits may change with notice or as disclosed by the checkout flow, subject to applicable law.
terms.terminationBody: We may suspend or terminate access, remove content, limit generation, withhold promotional credits, or refuse service when we believe there is abuse, fraud, payment risk, security risk, legal exposure, or a violation of these terms.
terms.disclaimersBody: Image Easy is provided on an as-is and as-available basis. We do not guarantee uninterrupted availability, specific model behavior, output quality, output uniqueness, storage permanence, or compatibility with every business purpose.
terms.liabilityBody: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Image Easy and its operators are not liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential, exemplary, or lost-profit damages arising from your use of the service, AI outputs, account activity, pricing changes, or third-party providers.
terms.changesBody: We may update these Terms of Use as the service, pricing, credits, models, laws, or business operations change. Continued use after an update means you accept the revised terms.
terms.contactBody: Questions about these terms can be sent to support@image-easy.com. Include your account email and a concise description of the issue.

contact.metaDescription: How to contact the Image Easy team.
contact.title: Contact the Image Easy team
contact.lead: We keep support direct so generation issues and account questions can be handled quickly.
contact.supportBody: For online support, email the Image Easy team at support@image-easy.com.
contact.supportDetails: When reporting a generation issue, include the account email, approximate time, model name, and a short description of what happened.

about.metaDescription: Image Easy is a focused multi-model AI image generation workspace.
about.title: About Image Easy
about.lead: Image Easy is a focused multi-model AI image generation workspace.
about.workspaceBody1: The product brings text-to-image and image-to-image models into one direct workflow for prompts, reference images, and saved results.
about.workspaceBody2: The goal is to make model choice simple without adding dashboards, token jargon, or unnecessary setup.
about.betaBody: Image Easy is built to keep model choice, prompts, reference images, and saved results in one practical workflow.

legal.metaDescription: Legal notices for Image Easy, including operator information, intellectual property, copyright complaints, third-party services, legal requests, and contact details.
legal.title: Legal Notice
legal.lead: This page collects legal notices for Image Easy, including operator contact information, intellectual property notices, copyright complaints, and third-party service disclosures.
legal.notice: This notice supplements the Privacy Policy and Terms of Use. If there is a conflict, the specific agreement or legally required notice controls for that subject.
legal.operatorBody: Image Easy is operated by Image Easy Inc. For general legal, privacy, billing, or support inquiries, contact support@image-easy.com and include enough detail for us to route the request.
legal.ipBody: Image Easy, the site design, product names, logos, software, text, and service materials are owned by Image Easy or its licensors and are protected by intellectual property laws. You may not copy, modify, resell, or misuse the service except as permitted by the Terms of Use.
legal.copyrightBody: If you believe content processed through Image Easy infringes your copyright or other rights, email support@image-easy.com with your contact information, a description of the work, the allegedly infringing material, the relevant URL or account details, and a statement that you are authorized to submit the complaint.
legal.thirdPartyBody: Image Easy relies on third-party services for AI models, hosting, storage, authentication, analytics, and payment processing. Those providers may have their own terms, privacy notices, availability limits, safety rules, and pricing changes.
legal.lawRequestsBody: We review subpoenas, court orders, law-enforcement requests, sanctions requirements, and other legal demands according to applicable law. We may preserve or disclose information when we believe it is legally required or necessary to protect users, the service, or others.
legal.contactBody: Legal notices should be sent to support@image-easy.com. Please include your name, organization if applicable, contact information, account email, and a clear description of the request.

auth.loginLead: Sign in to start generating images. Free credits are waiting for you.

create.lead: Choose a model, write a prompt, adjust parameters, and generate your image.
create.promptPlaceholderI2I: How should the references be transformed?
create.promptPlaceholderT2I: Describe your subject in plain language…
create.errorRequiresImage: This model requires at least one reference image.
create.uploaderCount: {count} / {max} · jpg, png, webp · up to 20 MB
create.uploaderHint: {max} max · jpg, png, webp · up to 20 MB
create.errorInsufficientCredits: Not enough credits for this generation. Choose a plan to continue creating.

descriptions.gpt-image-2-text-to-image: OpenAI's latest GPT-Image-2 — industry-leading text rendering and photorealism.
descriptions.gpt-image-2-image-to-image: Use GPT-Image-2 to re-render, restyle, or change the scene of a reference image.
descriptions.seedream-4-5-text-to-image: ByteDance Seedream 4.5 — supports 4K high-fidelity, complex scenes.
descriptions.seedream-4-5-edit: Seedream 4.5 image-to-image — preserves subject identity for precise retouching.
descriptions.nano-banana-pro: Google Gemini 3.0 Pro Image — multi-object consistency, 4K rendering.

archive.emptyText: No creations yet. Generate your first image when you are ready.
archive.emptyFilter: No creations for this model yet.
archive.printCount: {count, plural, =0 {No creations yet} one {# creation} other {# creations}}
archive.discardConfirm: Delete this creation from your history?

billing.title: Billing & usage
billing.lead: View your current plan, credit balance, usage history, and payment records.
billing.portalFailed: Could not open subscription management. Please try again.
billing.paymentFailedBody: Your subscription payment failed. Update your payment method to keep future credit grants active.

examples.metaDescription: Browse generated Image Easy examples across product visuals, advertising, portraits, interiors, food, and concept art.
examples.title: Generated image examples
examples.lead: These samples show the kinds of outputs Image Easy is designed to help create, compare, save, and reuse across multiple AI image models.
examples.ctaBody: Choose a model, describe the scene, and keep the result in your creations for reuse or download.

items.title: Minimal skincare product scene
items.body: A clean commercial product setup with soft lighting, neutral styling, and room for brand direction.

items.title: Running shoe campaign close-up
items.body: A dramatic action shot designed for campaign moodboards, social ads, and performance product concepts.

items.title: Coffee packaging still life
items.body: A simple product-packaging composition for testing layout, materials, and campaign atmosphere.

items.title: Cinematic astronaut portrait
items.body: A high-detail portrait style for character exploration, story worlds, and visual direction research.

items.title: Color-lit fashion portrait
items.body: A stylized editorial portrait for exploring lighting, wardrobe mood, and creative identity.

items.title: Illustrated story character
items.body: A warm illustration style suitable for story concepts, game references, and visual development.

items.title: Interior redesign comparison
items.body: A before-and-after interior direction showing how reference images can support redesign exploration.

items.title: Healthy meal overhead
items.body: A bright food composition for menus, wellness content, recipe cards, and social media visuals.

items.title: Floating island concept art
items.body: A fantasy environment image for worldbuilding, moodboards, and high-imagination visual prompts.
